null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: AccuWeather historical data shows 45.6°C at Jaipur on 28 May 2024 (one day after the flag); IMD-quoted reports document a late-May 2024 Rajasthan heatwave.
Searched Jaipur Oct 2025 early cold; typical October lows near 15.5°C consistent with the flag but no source confirms 9 Oct 2025 specifically.
Searched Jaipur rainfall 16 Sep 2023; only regional IMD data (Sep 2023 ~113% of normal nationally), no city/date-specific figure.
